subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Thy mention hath been made in My presence, and the tongue of My loving-kindness maketh mention of thee in the kingdom of My glorious and wondrous Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قد ذکر ذکرک فی محضری و یذکرک لسان عنایتی فی ملکوت ظهوری العزیز البدیع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @chastisement and requital
